data.name: SURF GIRLS LOVE SEX
data.detailed_description:
SURF GIRLS LOVE SEX - Your summer starts here! 💕

Feel the breath of the warm wind, the rustle of the waves and the thrill of first sympathy.
Welcome to a romantic game where every choice you make can lead to a hot blowjob or anal sex.

💬 In the game you will find:

💖 A minimum of boring plot - an ocean of sexy hot scenes.

🏄‍♂️ Summer atmosphere: beach parties, surfing, romance under the stars.

🌸 Each heroine is unique: from a daring surfer to a married woman.

🔥 A system of choices: your decisions influence the development of the relationship.

🎶 Atmospheric soundtrack and beautiful 3D graphics.

Don't miss the chance to spend the most romantic summer of your life.

“SURF GIRLS LOVE SEX” are waiting for you!

❤️ Find your sex story. Find your love.

data.short_description: Summer, surfing and lots of sex. What else could be better? Spend an unforgettable summer in the visual novel SURF GIRLS LOVE SEX!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 420 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 420 MB 可用空間
